headline: McDonald's U.S. Comps Jump 3.9%: What's Driving Momentum?
summary: MCD's U.S. comps rise 3.9% in Q1 2026 as McValue and new under-$3 deals draw cost-conscious diners, while margin pressure lingers.

headline: AI Job Destruction Is Coming, Another CEO Says
summary: Most Americans have never heard of Standard Chartered Plc. It is one of the 30 largest banks in the world, after the Chinese banks pulled out. Its CEO, Bill Winters, made the point, as some of his colleagues in the financial industry have, that job losses at his bank will be in the thousands or ...
